hero.headline: J Aviation
hero.subheadline: Strategic Land Use, Facilities, & Financial Planning for the Airport Industry.

specialty.title: Our Specialty is Airports.
specialty.body: We focus exclusively on the aviation sector. Our deep understanding of federal regulations, local zoning, and airport operations allows us to navigate complex projects from concept to completion. Whether it's maximizing land value, securing funding, or ensuring regulatory compliance, we speak the language of airports.

items.title: Financial Planning
items.description: Critical to creating a strategic long-term vision. We balance objectives with tenant needs, market demand, and operational realities while securing federal grant funding.

items.title: Land Use Planning
items.description: Providing expertise to cities, counties, and developers to ensure the highest and best use of land near airports, preserving compatibility and safety.

items.title: Facility Planning
items.description: Comprehensive assessment of airfield, terminal, and landside demand against real estate resources to upgrade, expand, or modify facilities.

items.title: Business & Policy
items.description: Working on strategic plans, air service development, and operations analysis to optimize service and maximize revenue in a market-driven environment.

about.title: About JAC
about.paragraph1: Founded by Nick Johnson in 2004, Johnson Aviation is a certified Small Business Enterprise (SBE) providing leadership on high profile and contentious aviation projects.
about.paragraph2: Our work at Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) and San Diego International Airport cleared the way for multi-billion-dollar development programs. We understand the unique challenges of airside and landside development.

stats.subtitle: Agency Coordination
stats.subtitleBody: Extensive experience partnering with the FAA, Caltrans, and local municipalities.
